flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Hocking College fell 28% between 2006 and 2009 (28.5% → 20.4%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Hocking College fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Hocking College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Hocking College fell 19% between 2017 and 2020 ($14.2k → $11.6k).
